expectations.text: A canonical v3 HTML file exists at the top level of the wireframes folder (not inside _historical/). Filename suggests it's the v3/canonical version.
A _historical/ subfolder exists at the wireframes folder root and contains the superseded v1 and v2 HTMLs.
A README.md exists at the wireframes folder root that functions as a design-intent spec.
expectations.evidence: README.md exists with 14 distinct sections (canonical files index, locked rules, feature flag table, accents, sections, URL, status, handoff brief, reference points, lineage)

expectations.text: The README has a section titled 'Locked design rules' or similar.
expectations.evidence: Explicit '## Locked design rules' section present

expectations.text: The README has a section listing/indexing the canonical files.
expectations.evidence: Explicit '## Canonical files index' section present

expectations.text: The README has a designer-handoff section distinguishing Locked vs Open for craft input.
expectations.evidence: ## For the designer (handoff brief) section with ### Locked — do not change without re-discussion + ### Open for craft input subsections

expectations.text: Each canonical HTML file contains an HTML comment near the top documenting what the file represents (mode/state/version).
expectations.evidence: v3 HTML header: 'CANONICAL — admin-console dashboard, v3 / Status: LOCKED / Variant: v3 — combined activity log into right rail'; _historical files also have explicit SUPERSEDED headers

expectations.text: The wireframes folder is located under outputs/systems/admin-console/reference/wireframes/ matching the skill's location pattern.
